title: Component Variants Example
subtitle: Show component variants, states, and notes.

sections.heading: Component Variants in use
sections.body: This template demonstrates variants and states by showing concrete button-like controls, selected cards, and disabled rows in one place.

cards.title: Primary
cards.body: Use for the one action that moves the artifact forward.

cards.title: Subtle
cards.body: Use for navigation, secondary commands, and dismissive actions.

cards.title: Danger
cards.body: Use only where destructive intent is clear from surrounding copy.
